creator: samesame@akruijff.dds.nl
text:
On Sun, Aug 16, 2009 at 07:10:37PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/samesame,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/137854 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/137854
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

I disaprove. The latest version is 1.3.
http://samesame.kruijff.org/download.html

Version 1.4 is a development version only and will break the port in the
future.

-- 
Alex
